message:
shared: Add generic path relativization to unified transcripts

Add recursive relativizePaths() helper that catches absolute paths in
tool inputs/outputs that were previously missed by field-specific
handlers. This fixes paths leaking in:
- Grep/Glob path input field
- Grep content output (file paths in grep results)
- Any nested paths in tool outputs

Applied to claudecode.ts, codex.ts, and opencode.ts converters.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/mhc86qr93cpjqhcaezp8d5n4

files.patch:

+      "Index: ./JOKE.md
       ===================================================================
-      --- /Users/philipp/dev/agentlogs/JOKE.md
-      +++ /Users/philipp/dev/agentlogs/JOKE.md
+      --- ./JOKE.md
+      +++ ./JOKE.md
       @@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
        Why did the elevator break up with the staircase?
        It felt the relationship was going nowhere fast.
